data.name: Isla Hearts
data.detailed_description:
Made by a solo developer, Isla Hearts is an adult turn-based RPG where seduction is the deadliest weapon.

STORY

In a world corrupted by the virus queen, you are a lone hero venturing into a dangerous territory. Her servants don't just want to defeat you, they want to drain your XP & life essence, stealing your hard earned levels through temptation and desire.

COMBAT

Battle corrupted enemies in strategic turn-based combat. Manage your HP, SP, and a unique Temptation meter. As enemies seduce you, your resistance crumbles. Will you fight back, or give in to desire?

• Strategic combat with skills, items, and status effects

• Temptation system - resist or surrender for different outcomes

• XP drain mechanics - defeat means losing progress

• Multiple enemy types with unique attacks and seduction styles

FEATURES

• Explore dangerous forests and the ominous Fragment Tower

• Face challenging boss battles

• Visit Scarlet's Casino

• Achievement system with progressive and story-based unlocks

• Multiple character encounters and branching dialogue

WARNING: This game contains explicit adult content and is intended for players 18+.

data.short_description: A dark 18+ RPG where enemies seduce rather than simply attack. Manage HP, SP, and Temptation in strategic combat. Defeat means losing your hard-earned experience. How long can you resist?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 400Mhz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Internal
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Not required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體

  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Internal
  • Storage: 500 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Not required
